feed.title: Techno Tim
feed.subtitle: Techno Tim Home - Documentation and More

entry.title: JetKVM: Promises Made, Promises Kept?
entry.summary: I received my JetKVM from backing it on Kickstarter and I wanted to find out if it delivers on all of its many promises it made during their campaign. 📺 Watch Video Info Check out JetKVM: https://jetkvm.com/ JetKVM on GitHub: https://github.com/jetkvm Other Products I used (affiliate links below) EZCOO Switch (hotkey model): https://amzn.to/3QKNGU4 EZCOO KVM Switch: https://amzn.to...

entry.title: The MINI Network RACK Ubiquiti should make

link.title: The MINI Network RACK Ubiquiti should make

entry.summary: After building a mini rack that included an entire Homelab, I decided to build 2 more custom mini racks that focus solely on networking. 📺 Watch Video Info Thank you to DeskPi for sending this mini rack. Note: I was not paid to make this video nor did DeskPi or Ubiquiti have any input. I just love racks of all sizes and UniFi gear fits nicely in it, not to mention there are quite a few 3D...

entry.title: HomeLab Services Tour (Early 2025)
entry.summary: After seeing my HomeLab Hardware tour, many of you asked what I am self-hosting in it… Well, here are all of the services and software I am running in my HomeLab in 2025! 📺 Watch Video Info Self-hosting in 2025: What’s running in my HomeLab? After sharing my HomeLab hardware setup, the next big question was—what am I actually running on it? Well, here’s the full list of all the services ...

entry.title: PiKVM Switch: The Best KVM Solution Yet?

link.title: PiKVM Switch: The Best KVM Solution Yet?

entry.summary: I tested the PiKVM Switch Multiport Extender with every device I had. Here’s how it went. 📺 Watch Video Info Thanks to PiKVM for sending over the switches to test with all of my many random and stubborn devices. They did not pay me to make this video nor do they have any input into the contents of this video. https://docs.pikvm.org/switch/ Other Products in this Video: 7” Monitor w...

entry.title: HomeLab Hardware Tour (Early 2025)
entry.summary: Here’s all of the hardware I am running in my Homelab in 2025!
